title: Orbs 'n' Stuff
description: Adds Diablo-style 'health drops' that heal the player on pickup, as well as other orbs that provide bonuses like XP and status effects.
body:
![Main orbs and stuff banner. A zombie being killed with mutliple brightly colored orbs popping out of it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b627762f26bc3d79ed907a8063d2749bdd9ea2cf_0.webp) Health drops like Diablo III and many other RPGs. Gain health as you wade through the armies of the night! Beyond just health, Orbs 'n' Stuff adds a variety of other orbs that can spawn on kill. All orbs are fully configurable in-game. ### HP Orb Your basic health-boost orb. Gain back some health when you pick it up! Orbs drop more frequently when you are at low health (by default), helping you stay in the fight. ![HP orb floating on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731436ec284fb9b58ead1e2eba6b753a68ee504c.png) ### XP Orb Much like it's vanilla brethren, this orb grants you an XP boost on pickup. Its chance of dropping is increased when you kill mobs you haven't killed many times before. ![XP Orb floating on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511dc0f84e4bd4690fd75348431fcd9f66b5f573_0.webp) ### Status Effect Orb Unlocked once you've entered the Nether, these orbs grant positive status effects on pickup, with a rare chance to provide 2 statuses in one go! These orbs drop more frequently the more statuses the killed mob had. ![Status orb floating on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9820df192b5360ecc3816f7aeaf97c3b4d0b8a_0.webp) ### Boss Orb (Orb of Accomplishment) Dropped on first kill of a boss, these resplendent orbs grant you an Orb of Accomplishment on pickup. Use that orb (right click) to choose between one of three randomly chosen *permanent* stat boosts! ![Boss orb floating on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6f97af0aede49b0c17f74c6084314b7dafb6e6_0.webp)

[![Bisect Hosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp "Bisect Hosting Banner")](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs)
